Home / Service Areas / Roseville

Irrigation in Roseville, CA

Trusted local professionals serving Roseville and surrounding communities

Serving Roseville, CA

Roseville's planned communities deserve irrigation systems as refined as their neighborhoods. Onyx Irrigation designs drought-resistant solutions for this fast-growing city where summer temperatures regularly top 100°F. From drip irrigation for water-wise landscaping to repairing sprinkler systems in established 1990s-2000s developments, we combine local expertise with water conservation technology. Our services help Roseville residents maintain curb appeal while complying with Placer County water regulations.

Roseville blends suburban living with extensive parks and trail systems.

Irrigation Services in Roseville

Smart Irrigation Installation

Upgrade to weather-responsive controllers that automatically adjust watering based on Sacramento's microclimates.

Learn more →

Drip Irrigation Systems

Targeted watering for drought-tolerant landscapes and vegetable gardens, minimizing evaporation loss.

Learn more →

Sprinkler System Repair

Fast fixes for common Sacramento irrigation issues from broken heads to valve leaks.

Learn more →

Backflow Prevention Services

Certified testing and installation to protect Sacramento's drinking water supply.

Learn more →

Custom Irrigation Design

Tailored water management plans for Sacramento's diverse properties.

Learn more →

Need Irrigation in Roseville?

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Roseville and the surrounding area.
